case_title: LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION VS. KANNETH MANTOOTH

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100053603, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION SERVED NOV-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANTOOTH, KANNETH
